notes: Re-captured at WI-6.3e (unified fs-txn engine). The legacy characterization surprise (a completed-but-never-cleaned journal's backup dir leaking forever) is GONE: committed leftovers are swept whole at the run-entry check.
No ref literals appear anywhere in this fixture: every case here reports only booleans, counts, and the ConfigError code string -- no ref-grammar re-baseline caveat applies.
